title: Find Latest Group of Size M
hints: Instead of scanning for groups after each step, track group lengths as bits are set. What happens when you flip a bit adjacent to existing groups?
Use an array to store the length of the group at each index. When setting a bit, check its neighbors to merge groups and update their boundary lengths.
The group length is stored only at its endpoints. When merging, update the new endpoints' values to the combined length and check if it equals m.
